description_long: This is an adult male figure with a muscular build, standing with arms slightly extended to the sides. He is dressed in a fitted short-sleeve t-shirt and straight-cut jeans, complemented by casual lace-up shoes. His hair is styled in a medium-length, slicked-back look tied into a small bun at the back. The figure's facial features are well-defined, and he wears a wristwatch on his left wrist. The clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing the athletic physique. The overall appearance suggests a casual, urban style suitable for city environments.
description: A muscular adult male in casual attire, featuring a t-shirt, jeans, and lace-up shoes, with hair tied in a bun and a wristwatch. The figure has a relaxed, upright stance and an urban, modern look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, chest, and front details of the t-shirt and jeans, with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the arm, and the bun hairstyle, as well as the wristwatch.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head with the bun, the back of the t-shirt and jeans, and the overall posture.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and bun, but without the wristwatch visible.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt and straight-cut jeans with a wristwatch accessory
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair tied in a bun
